cozycreate.quests.chapter.getting_starte: A quick prep run before we head out together.
cozycreate.quests.gather_log.subtitle: Wood is the start of everything.
cozycreate.quests.gather_log.desc.2: That's it. The first thirty seconds of every Minecraft world, every time. Get an oak log in your inventory and the helmet and chestplate are yours.
cozycreate.quests.crafting_table.subtitl: The most important block in the game.
cozycreate.quests.crafting_table.desc.2: Four planks. You know the move. This unlocks a backpack and a sleeping bag — everything you need to carry the haul and crash on the road.
cozycreate.quests.take_stock.subtitle: Equipped. Time to find our spot.
cozycreate.quests.take_stock.desc.1: Helmet, chestplate, backpack, sleeping bag. Solid kit.
cozycreate.quests.take_stock.desc.2: Take this last reward — ten hot potatoes for the road and a small book that points at what's new in this pack.
cozycreate.quests.take_stock.desc.3: Then we travel. The first place we landed isn't necessarily the place we're staying.
